programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone in Gokuldham feels worried about Popatlal when Madhubala makes a decision about marrying him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal and his friends meet up with Madhubala's family to hear Madhubala's decision about her marriage.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone in Gokuldham is bursting with happiness and excitement. They make preparations for Popatlal's engagement.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Jethalal realises that business is rather slow, he immediately asks his staff to cut down on expenses.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal endures a rather depressing day in terms of business and is convinced that he needs good luck and positivity. He shares his ordeal with his friends in the society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal wakes up with the stern resolution to stay positive to attract good luck. So, he avoids getting angry at Bhide, Daya, Iyer, Bagha and many others.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finally loses his temper when Bagha asks for leave. His anger grows when Bawri arrives at Gada Electronics.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is pleased that Bawri has agreed to visit his shop daily. Champaklal does not comply with Jethalal's thinking.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A business association receives a complaint against Jethalal, following which they summon him. Jethalal wonders about the reason for his summon.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal is impressed with Daya's diligence in managing household expenses. Madhavi convinces Bhide to let her go shopping for saris.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya tries to talk Jethalal into going to Goa for a family trip, with one of her friends tagging along.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Bhide feels angry on seeing Tapu Sena playing Holi and causing trouble, he yells at them to go home.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Iyer secretly makes a plan to take Babita to Mahabaleshwar on Holi. He confides in Daya and tells her his idea.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal also plans a trip to Mahabaleshwar on Holi after hearing about Iyer's idea to take Babita there.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya learns about the trip to Mahabaleshwar but finds it increasingly difficult to keep the news to herself.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is surprised to discover that Babita is no longer going to Mahabaleshwar as they had planned.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham residents are enjoying the Holi celebration. However, Jethalal is stuck in his flat and decides to escape through the balcony.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gada family learn about a robbery in their area and prepare to keep their valuables safe. Jethalal receives a large cash payment from a man dressed in shabby clothes.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A gang of chain snatchers rob Anjali's gold necklace, frightening the members of Gokuldham Society. Jethalal finds an innovative way to carry a large sum of cash home.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The gang of robbers choose Mohanlal as their next victim and fire their guns in the society when they get caught. When Jethalal learns about the incident, he rushes back home.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal worries about the large amount of cash in his house. Tapu and his friends prepare to protect Gokuldham from the robbers.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak and Jethalal try to convince everyone to hire a security guard after several robberies, but they reject the idea.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finally decides to hire a security guard for everyone's safety. Bhide eventually fires the guard, making Jethalal worried.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham experiences a frightening night when thieves rob Jethalal at gunpoint. The following day, Taarak introduces a new security guard to protect the community.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The new security guard proves his worth when another robber strikes Gokuldham. The women take action to enhance community safety.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu's friends and Gokuldham's women join forces to protect their community from criminals. The robbers find a chance to rob Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Disguised as repairmen, the thieves enter Jethalal's home. Their plan backfires when they learn that the real repairmen are already in the house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The robbers threaten Daya, forcing Jethalal to surrender. As they flee, Tapu and his friends block their escape route.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and his friends gets honoured and felicitated for their bravery. Everyone get invited to participate in an anti-tobacco campaign.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Iyer jokingly tells Jethalal to move out of Gokuldham and go back to his hometown. Upon hearing, Jethalal feels perplexed by his friends words.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Being troubled by the current issues at work, Bagha decides to call Nattu Kaka to discuss their concerns.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal believes that he should confront Bagha and Nattu Kaka to settle their agreement once and for all, but he eventually runs into Babita and Iyer.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Iyer jokingly teases Jethalal by telling everyone to punish him for being late. Jethalal comes up with a revenge plan.
